Video.summary: Two thieves cause trouble after they overhear a conversation between a couple of businessmen.
Video.title: Trial by Fear

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old gang member comes to town.
Video.title: Preacher with a Past

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: A husband and wife catch trouble when they allow an Apache chief's granddaughter to stay with them.
Video.title: Suzie

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: Diamond Jim Brady is traveling through Texas by railroad and waging wild bets along the way.
Video.title: Diamond Jim Brady

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: Wyatt Earp's brother Virgil masquerades as a bandit to gain access to an outlaw hide-out.
Video.title: Trial at Belle's Springs

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: Widow Lucy Tutaine decides to sue the railroad when her cow is hit by a train.
Video.title: The Train and Lucy Tutaine

Video.summary: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.
Video.title: Coffin for a Coward

Video.summary: The emperor of Brazil finds himself stranded in the countryside and unable to prove his identity.
Video.title: A Kingdom for a Horse

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.
Video.title: The Race at Cherry Creek

Video.summary: A poet forges a relationship with a street waif.
Video.title: Magic Locket

Video.summary: Native prisoners slip away from their captors and return to the warpath armed with stolen rifles.
Video.title: The Journey

Video.summary: A Native woman plans revenge after her husband is killed by thieves.
Video.title: The Captain Dick Mine

Video.summary: A mail delivery rider attempts to help a widow find the right man to marry.
Video.title: The Rider

Video.summary: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband West, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.
Video.title: No Place for a Lady

Video.summary: Newspaper editor Carolyn Romney launches a campaign against outlaws terrorizing Durango, Colorado.
Video.title: Mrs. Romney and the Outlaws

Video.summary: Challenges are faced as a boat on wheels travels across the prairie and through Native country.
Video.title: Dry Water Sailors

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: Sailor William Richardson falls in love with the Mexican comandante's daughter.
Video.title: The Water Bringer

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Opportunist Monte Dunning uses the predictions of a fortune teller to intimidate his fellow miners.
Video.title: The Gypsy

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: A rivalry over a pretty woman inadvertently causes trouble between cavalrymen and Natives.
Video.title: The Hero of Fort Halleck

Video.summary: Deputy Jim Brand hatches a plan to thwart a corrupt railroad lawyer.
Video.title: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Image.alt: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.
Video.title: Brute Angel

Video.summary: Doc Holliday, looking for cash to finance his gambling, tries to con a banker out of $20,000.
Video.title: Doc Holiday's Gold Bars
